payload.additional_notes: Diagonal staircase bisects the wall behind the sofa; two side tables with lamps and plants; visible light switches/thermostat near right doorway.
payload.image_summary: Front-facing living room view showing a dark leather couch centered below a diagonal staircase with white railing. Side tables with table lamps and plants flank the couch. Framed artwork decorates the stair wall and an open doorway and thermostat are visible to the right.
